What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Female athletes wearing sports bras and briefs stand on a blue indoor running track with white lane lines. Some competitors place hands on hips while others clap hands above their heads near white starting blocks numbered one through seven. Digital overlays display names like Paulina ZDZIĘBORSKA and Martyna KONIECZKO alongside event text reading 60m ppł KOBIET PIĘCIOBÓJ. Red banners with ORLEN logos line the background behind the competitors.

Describe the sequence of actions performed by the athletes from the initial standing position until they settle into the starting blocks.
canonical_answer: At 0s, athletes in white tops stand with hands on hips; at 2s, the central athlete in white claps her hands together; at 6s, she raises both hands to shoulder height with palms forward; at 12s, a woman bends to adjust the white starting blocks; at 18s, runners crouch down into the starting blocks.
